title: boechera polyantha
intro: Boechera polyantha, also known as western rock cress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boechera polyantha include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Boechera polyantha can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
